urdu transliteration text: Allah Ho Payambar
Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Aashiq Mere Mula(AS) Ke Hain Dono Hain Wafadar.
english translation text: Both are lovers of my Mawla Ali, and so are they loyal

urdu transliteration text: Ik Hazrat-e-Isa(AS) Hain Tu Ik Meesum-e-Tammar(AS)
english translation text: One is Hazrat Isa and the other is Methum e Tammar

urdu transliteration text: Haider(AS) Ki Muhabbat Mein Sar-e-Daar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both are punished for the love of Haidar

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Khud Kehte Hain Kufar Yeh Daawa Nahi Mera.
english translation text: This is not my claim but the disbelievers are are also saying this...

urdu transliteration text: Siffeen Ka Lashkar Ho Ya Ho Ghaat Ka Pehra
english translation text: Whether it is the army at Siffeen or Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Ghazi(AS) Ke Liye rait Ki Deewar Hain Dono.
For Hazrat Abbas, both these tasks are equally straightforward
Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Kam Aa Gayi Turbat Mein Meri Ulfat-e-Hasnain(AS)
english translation text: The love of Hassan and Hussain helped me in my grave

urdu transliteration text: Apne Hi Aqeeday Ke Mile Mujh Ko Naqeerain.
english translation text: The angels in the grave were of the same Faith as me

urdu transliteration text: Meri Tarha Mula(AS) Ke Azzadar Hain Dono
english translation text: Like me, both of them are azadaar of Imam Hussain

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Fitrus Yehi Kehta Howa Urta Hai Hawa Mein.
english translation text: Angel Fitrus soars in the sky saying this...

urdu transliteration text: Kabay Mein Dua Mang Lo Ya Karb-o-Bala Mein.
english translation text: “Whether you seek your supplications at the Kaabah or in Karbala...

urdu transliteration text: Shabbir(AS) Shehansha Ke Darbar Hain Dono.
english translation text: ... both these places are palaces of our Emperor Hussain”

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Mare Gaye Talwar Se Jab Marhab-o-Antar
english translation text: When Marhab and Antar were slain by swords

urdu transliteration text: Ashab-e-Payambar(SAW) Se Kaha Maut Ne Hans Kar
english translation text: Death itself remarked to the companions of the Prophet...

urdu transliteration text: Do Aye The Maidan Mein Ab Char Hain Dono
english translation text: “Two came to the battlefield and now they are split in four!”

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Ik Sajda-e-Mabood Se Munh Moor Raha Hai.
english translation text: One is deterring us from prostrating to The Creator...

urdu transliteration text: Ik Halqa-e-Matam Se Humein Toor Raha Hai
english translation text: Another is discouraging us from doing Maatam

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Kuch Bhi Kaho Asal Mein Ghadar Hain Dono.
Whatever you say, in actuality both are deceitful people
Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Ik Hai Shab-e-Mairaj Payambar(SAWW) Se Mokhatib.
english translation text: One was addressing the Prophet on the night of Mairaaj

urdu transliteration text: Ik Hai Sar-e-Darbar Sitamgar Se Mokhatib.
english translation text: One was addressing the oppressors in the palace

urdu transliteration text: Lehjay Mein Magar Haider-e-Karar Hain Dono
english translation text: But Both of them are the style and tone of Haider AS

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Kante Kabhi Phool Ki Tarha Ho Nahi Sakte
english translation text: Thorns can never be like the rose

Sote Hain Tu Sone Do Unhein Pas Nabi(SAW) Ke.
If they are sleeping, let them rest besides the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Fatima(SA) Zahra Ke Gunahgar Hain Dono
They are both perpetrators of Fatima Zahra
Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text:
Quran-o-Ali(AS) Ilm Ka Maiyar Hain Dono
Quran and Ali are Both pinnacles of knowledge
Abbas(AS) Ke Shagird Ali(AS) Ke Hain Nawasay
english translation text: They are the students of Abbas and grandchildren of Ali

Maut In Se Hai Darti Yeh Nahi Darte Qaza Se.
Death is afraid of them, not that they are afraid of death

urdu transliteration text: Zainab(SA) Ke Pishar Jafar-e-Teyar(AS) Hain Dono.
english translation text: Both of them are Zainabs sons and Jaffer e Tayyars grandchildren

urdu transliteration text: Allah-o-Payambar Ke Madadgar Hain Dono
english translation text: Both of them are helpers of Allah and the Prophet SAW
